description: Hold, repeat request, and a vague pending status. Tests patience and extraction from ambiguity.
scripted_rep_turns: Provider services. Let me put you on a brief hold while I pull this up.
Thanks for holding. Sorry, can you repeat the member ID for me?
Okay, found it. It's still processing, should be about 5 to 7 business days.
That's all I have on it right now. My name is Renee, reference HUM-REF-2210.
